name: neck-cn--tencentcloud-aiart-texttoimage
description: Skill for Tencent Cloud HunYuan Text-to-Image Generation (混元生图). Provides AI image generation from text prompts using the HunYuan large model. Supports reference images (垫图), resolution control, prompt rewriting, and reproducible generation with seed. Use when: generating images from text descriptions, AI art creation, poster/cover design, illustration generation, or any text-to-image tasks. Asynchronous API: submits a generation task and polls for the result image URL.
